arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool team to face Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon. arts.sum: The Brazilian goalkeeper played the full 90 minutes in the midweek win against AC Milan but reported a soreness on Thursday, forcing him to miss team practice.
